title: Home Page Inbox

posts.author: Jhilbert64 (Jeff Hilbert)
posts.cookedHtml:
I like the home page feature with it’s display of the different boards I recently accessed and the Inbox.

However, I’d like to clear the inbox items from there rather than navigate to the inbox to do that. Yes, its a small step to go to the Inbox to do that, but since its displaying in the home page, why not allow me to clear or act on the items in the Inbox that are displaying?
